# AVX512 intrinsics skip list (generated by simdgen_intrins).
# Every in-scope intrinsic is either emitted or listed here with a
# reason. Regenerate with the [intrins-skiplist] simdgen subcommand.
_kortest_mask16_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_kortest_mask32_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_kortest_mask64_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_kortest_mask8_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_ktest_mask16_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_ktest_mask32_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_ktest_mask64_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_ktest_mask8_u8	flag-reader with out-pointer (composable from z/c variants)
_load_mask16	scalar masked load/store (follow-up)
_load_mask32	scalar masked load/store (follow-up)
_load_mask64	scalar masked load/store (follow-up)
_load_mask8	scalar masked load/store (follow-up)

_mm512_zextsi256_si512	no instruction (cast/undefined)
_mm_comi_round_sd	flag-reader: comi predicate+sae (curated follow-up)
_mm_comi_round_ss	flag-reader: comi predicate+sae (curated follow-up)
_mm_mask_reduce_add_epi16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_add_epi8	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_and_epi16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_and_epi8	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_max_epi16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_max_epi8	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_max_epu16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_max_epu8	sequence (library-level)

_mm_mask_reduce_min_epi8	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_min_epu16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_min_epu8	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_mul_epi16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_mul_epi8	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_or_epi16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_reduce_or_epi8	sequence (library-level)
_mm_mask_store_sd	memory form without a register-addressable descriptor
_mm_mask_store_ss	memory form without a register-addressable descriptor
_mm_maskz_load_sd	scalar masked load/store (follow-up)
_mm_maskz_load_ss	scalar masked load/store (follow-up)
_mm_reduce_add_epi16	sequence (library-level)
_mm_reduce_add_epi8	sequence (library-level)

_mm_reduce_and_epi8	sequence (library-level)

_store_mask16	memory form without a register-addressable descriptor
_store_mask32	memory form without a register-addressable descriptor

_store_mask8	memory form without a register-addressable descriptor
